name: rundrill-babok-prep
description: Business-analysis coach (BABOK / IIBA) — prep for ECBA, CCBA, and CBAP by judging scenarios and reviewing real BA artifacts, with drills, progress, and mistake memory, inside your AI agent.

interface.shortDescription: Business-analysis coach: judge BABOK scenarios, review real BA artifacts, prep ECBA/CCBA/CBAP.
interface.longDescription: An interactive business-analysis coach for the IIBA certification ladder (ECBA → CCBA → CBAP). Blended drills pair an exam-style scenario judgment with producing a real BA artifact — a requirement, user story, stakeholder matrix, model, or business case — graded against a rubric. Signature drill: review a plausible BA artifact and find the planted defect (a solution stated as a requirement, a passive-voice requirement that hides the actor, an everything-is-a-must MoSCoW list). Plus mock-elicitation role-plays and timed cumulative mock exams. Backed by the RunDrill MCP engine with progress tracking and mistake memory. Optional practitioner track for beyond-BABOK job skills (BPMN/UML/DMN, SQL, facilitation).
defaultPrompt: Give me a scenario and let me judge what the BABOK answer is.
Show me a requirement and let me find what's wrong with it.
